title: Pleasures Pernicious.
content:
Where pleasures rule a kingdom, never there
    Is sober virtue seen to move her sphere.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Pleasures Pernicious.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
